title: T-023 — UI: Spare Parts List + Detail + Reorder + Adjust modals (MNT-026, MNT-027, MNT-M-07/M-08)
prompt:
# T-023 — Spare Parts pages + modals

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-026, MNT-027, §10.4 MNT-M-07, MNT-M-08
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:636-687
Prototypes: spares.jsx:1-261 (spares_list_page, spare_detail_page); modals.jsx:595-619 (spare_reorder_modal); modals.jsx:902-925 (spare_adjust_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/spares` (catalog list, stock-low styling, KPI strip) and `/maintenance/spares/[id]` (2-column detail). Reorder modal (internal notification only — BL-MAINT-07 P2 D365 PO) and Adjust modal (>10% delta gate calling T-011 approval flow).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/page.tsx` — RSC + nuqs filters; 6-KPI strip; row-stock-low Tailwind bg-red-50.
2. `apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/[id]/page.tsx` — 2-column: left stock-by-location table + consumption history (spare_parts_transactions); right master data + linked assets.
3. Reorder modal: read-only summary card (supplier, lead-time from spare_parts.supplier_id join); qty Input; calls reorderSparePart Server Action (T-011) emitting outbox `spare_parts.reorder_requested`.
4. Adjust modal: new qty Input + reason Select (5 enum: damage/cycle_count/spillage/expired/other) + reason Textarea ≥10 chars; >10% delta → requires_approval=true returned by T-011; manager confirms via second-step (modal re-opens with `pending_approval` badge).
5. RBAC: Consume requires `mnt.spare.consume` (operator+); Adjust + Reorder require `mnt.spare.adjust`/`mnt.spare.reorder` (manager-tier).
6. Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n keys (`maintenance.spares.list.*`, `maintenance.spares.detail.*`, `maintenance.spares.reorder.*`, `maintenance.spares.adjust.*`).

## Prototype parity
- List 6-KPI strip + filter bar + Tailwind stock-low row + Reorder/Adjust inline — RTL snapshot spares.jsx:1-115.
- Detail 2-col with stock-by-location and consumption history — snapshot spares.jsx:117-261.
- Reorder modal supplier info + P2 alert banner BL-MAINT-07 — snapshot modals.jsx:595-619.
- Adjust modal 5-enum reason + >10% gate — snapshot modals.jsx:902-925.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/_components/spares-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/_components/spare-reorder-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/_components/spare-adjust-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/spares/_components/__tests__/spares.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list renders, when compared to spares.jsx:1-115, then KPI strip + filter bar + stock-low row styling + RBAC-gated Adjust+Reorder match by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given detail renders, when compared to spares.jsx:117-261, then 2-column with stock-by-location + consumption history + master data + linked assets match.
3. Given reorder submitted, when settled, then outbox spare_parts.reorder_requested emitted with bl_maint_07_note (no D365 push P1).
4. Given adjust submitted with 15% delta, when settled, then T-011 returns requires_approval=true, modal shows pending badge, and manager second-step flips flag.
5. Given operator session, when /maintenance/spares renders, then Adjust + Reorder buttons hidden server-side (only Consume visible).
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + Playwright e2e for reorder+adjust flows.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/spares`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not add LP picker or FEFO logic — D-MNT-6 boundary (qty_on_hand simple tracking).
- Do not push to D365 PO — BL-MAINT-07 P2.
- Do not allow Adjust without ≥10 char reason (V-MNT-21 manager-approval gate).
- Do not bypass RBAC server-side.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.

pipeline_inputs.description: Spare parts list + detail + Reorder modal + Adjust modal (>10% gate); prototype parity with spares.jsx + modals.jsx reorder/adjust.
